title: I was giving my coding agent context the wrong way...
summary: Video covers best practices for providing context to coding agents. Discusses codebase harness setup and demonstrates techniques for improving agent performance through proper context structuring.
writeup: The video reframes how context should be supplied to coding agents, arguing that common approaches undercut agent performance. It walks through codebase harness setup and demonstrates concrete techniques for structuring context so agents work more effectively. The core takeaway is that context management and prompt engineering, not just model choice, determine how well a coding agent handles a codebase.
